title: Fantasy Weapons (Medieval Series)
description: Various new medieval fantasy style weapons that fit in nicely with the vanilla style.
body:
### Fight using new various weapons, completely available in survival!

![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fcbc139267d68d587c334b027018f86296e7dcb6.png)

Many weapons are made specifically to match the armor from my other mod, [Fantasy Armor](https://modrinth.com/mod/fantasy_armor). I recommend using them together.

All weapons are identical to the netherite sword in characteristics. You can craft it very easily if you have a netherite one.

You will only need to make some **Blazing stones** and combine them with your sword item. You can see the rest of the recipes by using JEI.

![Blazing stone craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fef97b1a7d8f186ff874f204796d591ca5610eab.png)
![Eclipse Soldier spear craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1cf5b89ff2e2aa4bfd6aad1837e8164db5f0485.png)

You are welcome to create modpacks, datapacks, resourcepacks for this mod and you can contact me if you need help. 
You are NOT allowed to create separate forks, reuploads or use the assets in any way without my written permission.
I feel it is necessary to repeat this here.
